scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ros/shared && npm run build --workspace @ros/api && npm run build --workspace @ros/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ros/shared && npm run lint --workspace @ros/api && npm run lint --workspace @ros/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @ros/shared && npm run test --workspace @ros/api && npm run test --workspace @ros/web
